# iPhone 15 Pro Overview

The iPhone 15 Pro is priced at $999 and features a 6.1-inch OLED display powered by the advanced A17 Pro chip, making it a premium smartphone option. It boasts a 48MP main camera, a 3274mAh battery, and comes in multiple storage configurations ranging from 128GB to 1TB, all while maintaining a lightweight design at just 187 grams. With an impressive 4.6 out of 5-star rating, the iPhone 15 Pro delivers excellent performance and user satisfaction.
